title: Brazen status — Lofty assigned WS1.4 jsonld-processor; Radiant mid WS2.1; knip stable green
body: T+~14min. Lofty WS1.3 lifecycle closed; assigned WS1.4 jsonld-processor (single cycle: expand+compact+frame; reviewer flags type-expert + assumptions-expert + test-expert pre-set). Radiant still mid WS2.1 staging. Shaded paused on doc handoff due to Dusky overlap (cross-thread, agentic-engineering, not my concern). Knip remains green. No new comms-tooling friction this tick. Watching for Radiant SHA + Lofty WS1.4 progress in parallel.
